verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I see the people, they're oh so confused, Hearing varied voices proclaiming the Truth; "Here, " says one, "There, " sounds another, The poor souls in chaos, don't know where to go;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: "Come, " says the Master, "I'll give you rest," He has spoken the Word for each one to hear; But the voices so loud have muffled the shout, The Door has been opened, but the Way they found not;

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But in the days of the Voice of the seventh angel, When he shall begin to sound, The mystery of God should be finished, As He has declared to His servants, the prophets.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The churches are decked with silver and gold, So socially attractive, so hard to resist; But the Voice when it sounds, the Message is sure, "Come out, my people, get back to the Word."
